description_long: This is a pair of scissors featuring two red plastic handles and two metallic blades joined at a central pivot. The handles are oval-shaped with large finger loops, designed for comfortable grip and control. The blades are straight, with one blade appearing slightly darker, possibly coated or made from a different metal. The central joint is a visible rivet, allowing the blades to pivot smoothly for cutting. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for general-purpose cutting tasks in urban environments such as offices, schools, or homes. The scissors have a clean, modern appearance with no visible brand markings.
description: A pair of red-handled scissors with metallic blades and a central rivet joint, designed for general-purpose cutting.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the thinness of the scissors and the layered construction of the handles and blades.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both red handles, large finger loops, and the open metallic blades crossing at the central rivet.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim form and the alignment of the handles and blades.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open blades and symmetrical red handles.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, oval-shaped, ambidextrous handles made of smooth plastic with no visible padding or special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard fixed pivot design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two large, equal-sized oval loops with smooth surfaces, designed to accommodate multiple fingers comfortably.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Blades have blunt, rounded tips for safety and general-purpose cutting.
